specSection:
initProject :: () → ()
initProject() =
  | exists("backlog/") → skip   -- already initialised
  | otherwise          → backlog init <projectName> --defaults --agent-instructions none
ground_truth_rationale: backlog/ does not exist (fresh repo), so the 'otherwise' branch fires: run 'backlog init my-project --defaults --agent-instructions none'. Clear INIT case regardless of project name.
